ThirdPartyId.description: The ID of the registered third party application
ThirdPartyId.name: ThirdPartyId

BadRequest.description: An error message indicating the validation problem with the request.

Forbidden.description: An error message indicating the caller is forbidden from accessing this service

InternalServerError.description: An error message indicating there was an unexpected server error

NotAuthorized.description: An error message indicating either authorization token is invalid or there are no accounts the caller is allowed to view or use for trading that are registered with the provided third party application

NotFound.description: An error message indicating the resource is not found

ServiceUnavailable.description: An error message indicating server has a temporary problem responding

orderTypeRequest.description: Same as orderType, but does not have UNKNOWN since this type is not allowed as an input

info.description: Schwab Trader API access to Account, Order entry and User Preferences
info.title: Trader API - Account Access and User Preferences

get.description:
All the linked account information for the user logged in. The
balances on these accounts are displayed by default however the positions
on these accounts will be displayed based on the "positions" flag.

parameters.description:
This allows one to determine which fields they want returned. Possible value in this String can be:
positions
Example:
fields=positions
parameters.name: fields

200.description: List of valid "accounts", matching the provided input parameters.

get.summary: Get linked account(s) balances and positions for the logged in user.

get.description: Account numbers in plain text cannot be used outside of headers or request/response bodies. As the first step consumers must invoke this service to retrieve the list of plain text/encrypted value pairs, and use encrypted account values for all subsequent calls for any accountNumber request.

200.description: List of valid "accounts", matching the provided input parameters.

get.summary: Get list of account numbers and their encrypted values

get.description:
Specific account information with balances and positions.
The balance information on these accounts is displayed by default but
Positions will be returned based on the "positions" flag.

parameters.description: The encrypted ID of the account
parameters.name: accountNumber

parameters.description:
This allows one to determine which fields they want returned. Possible values in this String can be:
positions
Example:
fields=positions
parameters.name: fields

200.description: A valid account, matching the provided input parameters

get.summary: Get a specific account balance and positions for the logged in user.

get.description: All orders for a specific account. Orders retrieved can be filtered based on input parameters below. Maximum date range is 1 year.

parameters.description: The encrypted ID of the account
parameters.name: accountNumber

parameters.description: The max number of orders to retrieve. Default is 3000.
parameters.name: maxResults

parameters.description:
Specifies that no orders entered before this time should be returned. Valid ISO-8601 formats are :
yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ Example fromEnteredTime is '2024-03-29T00:00:00.000Z'. 'toEnteredTime' must also be set.
parameters.name: fromEnteredTime

parameters.description:
Specifies that no orders entered after this time should be returned.Valid ISO-8601 formats are :
yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ. Example toEnteredTime is '2024-04-28T23:59:59.000Z'. 'fromEnteredTime' must also be set.
parameters.name: toEnteredTime

parameters.description: Specifies that only orders of this status should be returned.
parameters.name: status

200.description: A List of orders for the account, matching the provided input parameters

get.summary: Get all orders for a specific account.

post.description: Place an order for a specific account.

parameters.description: The encrypted ID of the account
parameters.name: accountNumber

201.description: Empty response body if an order was successfully placed/created.

Location.description:
Link to the newly created order if order was successfully
created.

post.summary: Place order for a specific account.

delete.description: Cancel a specific order for a specific account

parameters.description: The encrypted ID of the account
parameters.name: accountNumber

parameters.description: The ID of the order being cancelled
parameters.name: orderId

200.description: Empty response body if an order was successfully canceled.

delete.summary: Cancel an order for a specific account

get.description: Get a specific order by its ID, for a specific account

parameters.description: The encrypted ID of the account
parameters.name: accountNumber

parameters.description: The ID of the order being retrieved.
parameters.name: orderId

200.description: An order object, matching the input parameters

get.summary: Get a specific order by its ID, for a specific account

put.description: Replace an existing order for an account. The existing order will be replaced by the new               order. Once replaced, the old order will be canceled and a new order will be created.

parameters.description: The encrypted ID of the account
parameters.name: accountNumber

parameters.description: The ID of the order being retrieved.
parameters.name: orderId

201.description: Empty response body if an order was successfully replaced/created.

Location.description:
Link to the newly created order if order was successfully
created.

put.summary: Replace order for a specific account

post.description: Preview an order for a specific account.

parameters.description: The encrypted ID of the account
parameters.name: accountNumber

200.description: An order object, matching the input parameters

post.summary: Preview order for a specific account.

get.description: All transactions for a specific account. Maximum number of transactions in response is 3000. Maximum date range is 1 year.

parameters.description: The encrypted ID of the account
parameters.name: accountNumber

parameters.description:
Specifies that no transactions entered before this time should be returned. Valid ISO-8601 formats are :
yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ . Example start date is '2024-03-28T21:10:42.000Z'. The 'endDate' must also be set.
parameters.name: startDate

parameters.description:
Specifies that no transactions entered after this time should be returned.Valid ISO-8601 formats are :
yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ. Example start date is '2024-05-10T21:10:42.000Z'. The 'startDate' must also be set.
parameters.name: endDate

parameters.description: It filters all the transaction activities based on the symbol specified. <u>NOTE:</u> If there is any special character in the symbol, please send th encoded value.
parameters.name: symbol

parameters.description: Specifies that only transactions of this status should be returned.
parameters.name: types

200.description:
A List of orders for the account, matching the provided input
parameters

get.summary: Get all transactions information for a specific account.

get.description: Get specific transaction information for a specific account

parameters.description: The encrypted ID of the account
parameters.name: accountNumber

parameters.description: The ID of the transaction being retrieved.
parameters.name: transactionId

200.description: A List of orders for the account, matching the provided input parameters

get.summary: Get specific transaction information for a specific account

get.description: Get all orders for all accounts

parameters.description: The max number of orders to retrieve. Default is 3000.
parameters.name: maxResults

parameters.description:
Specifies that no orders entered before this time should be returned. Valid ISO-8601 formats are-
yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ Date must be within 60 days from today's date.
'toEnteredTime' must also be set.
parameters.name: fromEnteredTime

parameters.description:
Specifies that no orders entered after this time should be returned.Valid ISO-8601 formats are -
yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ. 'fromEnteredTime' must also be set.
parameters.name: toEnteredTime

parameters.description: Specifies that only orders of this status should be returned.
parameters.name: status

200.description:
A List of orders for the specified account or if its not mentioned,
for all the linked accounts, matching the provided input parameters.

get.summary: Get all orders for all accounts
